title: Logical Operators Practice
instructions: Write functions using and, or, and not operators to combine conditions effectively.
solution:
def can_vote(age, is_citizen):
    """Return True if person can vote (18+ and citizen)"""
    return age >= 18 and is_citizen

def gets_discount(age, is_student, is_military):
    """Return True if eligible for discount (under 18, 65+, student, or military)"""
    return age < 18 or age >= 65 or is_student or is_military

def is_valid_password(password):
    """Return True if password is 8+ chars and contains both letters and numbers"""
    has_letter = any(c.isalpha() for c in password)
    has_number = any(c.isdigit() for c in password)
    return len(password) >= 8 and has_letter and has_number
hints: Use 'and' when all conditions must be true
Use 'or' when at least one condition must be true
You can use any() to check if any character matches a condition

testCases.description: can_vote should return True for citizens aged 18 or older
testCases.validation: assert can_vote(18, True) == True and can_vote(25, True) == True, 'Citizens 18+ should be able to vote'

testCases.description: can_vote should return False for non-citizens or underage
testCases.validation: assert can_vote(17, True) == False and can_vote(25, False) == False, 'Underage or non-citizens cannot vote'

testCases.description: gets_discount should return True for eligible groups
testCases.validation: assert gets_discount(10, False, False) == True and gets_discount(70, False, False) == True and gets_discount(25, True, False) == True, 'Under 18, 65+, students should get discount'

testCases.description: is_valid_password should require 8+ chars with letters and numbers
testCases.validation: assert is_valid_password('hello123') == True and is_valid_password('abcd1234') == True, 'Valid passwords should have 8+ chars with both letters and numbers'

testCases.description: is_valid_password should reject passwords missing letters or numbers
testCases.validation: assert is_valid_password('12345678') == False and is_valid_password('abcdefgh') == False, 'Passwords without both letters and numbers should fail'

testCases.description: is_valid_password should reject short passwords even with letters and numbers
testCases.validation: assert is_valid_password('abc1') == False, 'Short passwords should be rejected even if they contain letters and numbers'

description: Practice combining conditions using Python logical operators (and, or, not). Implement voting eligibility checks, discount qualification logic with multiple criteria, and password validation requiring minimum length plus mixed character types — common real-world patterns for conditional logic.
